backend_files_read.app_py_excerpt: Verified admin settings web routes in /home/aatish/app/genset/web/app.py: GET /admin/settings renders settings.html using UserRepository.list_all, permission matrix rows, and permission matrix users. Verified POST form routes /admin/settings/users/create and /admin/users/create, /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/update and /admin/users/{user_id}/update, /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/password and /admin/users/{user_id}/password, /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/permissions and /admin/users/{user_id}/permissions, /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/delete and /admin/users/{user_id}/delete. These are HTML/form routes, not JSON admin APIs.
backend_files_read.services_py_excerpt: No Phase 6 admin service JSON API behavior found in core/services.py. Existing booking business rules remain in BookingService and were not part of the P6 implementation scope.
backend_files_read.models_py_excerpt: core/models.py defines User(username, password_hash, role, is_active=True, created_at='', last_login: Optional[str]=None, id: Optional[int]=None). Supported roles are admin and operator from backend config and permission defaults.
backend_files_read.permissions_py_excerpt: core/permissions.py defines settings_user_admin, monitor_access, vendor_management, generator_management, booking_create_update, booking_delete, billing_access, export_access, read_only_operational_views. The permission matrix maps settings_user_admin to GET /admin/settings and related admin form POST routes.
backend_files_read.tests_excerpt: Backend tests assert the permission matrix rows include settings_user_admin, monitor_access, vendor_management, generator_management, booking_create_update, booking_delete, billing_access, export_access, read_only_operational_views; settings_user_admin is not editable; admin settings context includes permission_matrix_rows and permission_matrix_users.

verified_contracts.business_rules_observed: Web route guarded by backend admin role; mobile Phase 6 gate uses named capability settings_user_admin per permission matrix contract. No JSON API exists for mobile user management.
